title: Buzbug Upgraded LED Fly Zapper Indoor, LED Bulbs Up to 50,000 Hours, 3 Lamps Sustainable Less Power, 3800V Powerful Electric Mosquito Zapper (New White)
bullet_points: Energy-Efficient & 10x Longer Lifespan: Equipped with 3 LED bulbs with a total power of 10W, this mosquito trap reduces energy use by 50%. Each LED bulb lasts 25,000~50,000 hours, 10 times longer than glass bulbs, and is replaceable for long-term saving energy and maintenance costs.
